title: image: enable gofumpt formatter
body:
common and storage already use gofumpt. enable it for image based on the
outcome from our community discussion[1]. And it makes this repo use the
same formatter consistently which is nice.

[1] https://github.com/containers/podman/discussions/27291

comments.body: ✅ A new PR has been created in buildah to vendor these changes: **https://github.com/containers/buildah/pull/6493**
